PROJECTS WORKSHOPS MUSIC BIO RESUME EXHIBITIONS RESIDENCIES EVENTS WRITINGS

Project Title 2 (Archived) 2024 · Different City, Country · None

This project represents an earlier exploratory phase focusing on static bio-sculptures and organic textures.

Created during a summer residency, the installation examined the decomposition of raw vegetable fibers over a period of 40 days.

Exhibition Venues

  1. Creative Arts Lab, City Gallery, 2024.
  2. BioMedia Art Space, 2024.
